candidates.why: This is an explicit production D&A line, but it appears as a component beneath the production/COGS section and the selected parent bucket is the total row 'Cost of revenues/COGS'. Adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the total 'Cost of revenues/COGS'. The only relevant operating D&A row for COGS is 'Depreciation /Amortization- Production', which appears embedded within that total via the production cost breakdown, so no separate COGS D&A should be added.

candidates.why: This appears as a sub-component of the selected parent row 'R&D costs'. Since 'R&D costs' is already selected for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding this separately would not be appropriate and could distort the intended XSGA minus XRD construction.
This appears under 'Administrative expenses' as a likely component of that selected parent row rather than a separate same-level expense to add.

This is an explicit D&A-related line within the distribution-cost section, but it sits under the selected parent row 'Distribution costs', indicating it is already embedded in that bucket. Also includes impairment losses, so adding it separately would risk double counting and scope contamination.
This is a more granular component under the distribution-cost section and is subordinate to the selected parent row 'Distribution costs'. It should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of subtotal/parent rows: 'R&D costs', 'Administrative expenses', and 'Distribution costs'. Visible D&A rows in those sections appear to be nested components already included in those selected rows, not separate same-level operating expenses to add later. Therefore no separate XSGA_DA rows should be added.
